svg.title: CapsWriter TUI v2
svg.desc: CapsWriter TUI v2 running in Textual: server connection and diagnostics controls above a keyboard-first file transcription workspace and transcript panel.

g.text: OpenAI-compatible diagnostics, files, and optional microphone capture
Health, readiness, and model results will appear here.
[INPUT] Paste an audio path or record
[IDLE] Ready for diagnostics, file input, or microphone recording.
without sounddevice or an input device.
No transcript yet. Select an audio file and start transcription.
